---
title: "Alex's Defender Metric Approach"
author: "Alex Lewis"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    fontsize: 11pt
    geometry:
      - margin=1in
    toc: false
    number-sections: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(lme4)
library(patchwork)

soccer_data <- read_csv("project_data/combined_seasons.csv")
soccer_data$`Avg Mins per Match` <- soccer_data$`Avg Mins per Match` / 
  soccer_data$`Matches Played`
soccer_data <- soccer_data %>%
  mutate(`Total Mins` = `Matches Played` * `Avg Mins per Match`) %>%
  rename(
    `Passes into Final Third`      = `1/3`,
    `Goals per 90`                 = `Goals p 90`,
    `Assists per 90`               = `Assists p 90`,
    `Shots per 90`                 = `Shots p 90`,
    `Expected Goals (xG)`          = `Expected Goals`,
    `Non-Penalty xG`               = `Exp NPG`,
    `Shot Creating Actions per 90` = `Shot creating actions p 90`,
    `Goal Creating Actions per 90` = `Goal creating actions p 90`,
    `Goals per Shot`               = `Goals per shot`,
    `Goals per Shot on Target`     = `Goals per shot on target`,
    `Tackles Attempted`            = `Tackles attempted`,
    `Shots Blocked`                = `Shots blocked`,
    `Passes Blocked`               = `Passes blocked`,
    `Dribble Tackle Success %`     = `% Dribbles tackled`,
    `Pass Completion %`            = `Pass completion %`,
    `Key Passes`                   = `Key passes`,
    `Progressive Pass Distance`    = `Progressive passes distance`,
    `Passes into Penalty Area`     = `Passes into penalty area`,
    `Take-Ons Attempted`           = `Take ons attempted`,
    `Successful Take-On %`         = `% Successful take-ons`,
    `Carries into Final Third`     = `carries final 3rd`,
    `Carries into Penalty Area`    = `carries penalty area`,
    `Possessions Lost`             = `Possessions lost`,
    `Aerial Duel Win %`            = `% Aerial Duels won`
  )
soccer_data <- soccer_data %>%
  mutate(comp = str_trim(comp),
         comp = recode(comp,
           "eng Premier League" = "Premier League",
           "de Bundesliga"      = "Bundesliga",
           "es La Liga"         = "La Liga",
           "fr Ligue 1"         = "Ligue 1",
           "it Serie A"         = "Serie A"
         ))
soccer_data <- na.omit(soccer_data)
```

```{r}
gks <- soccer_data %>% filter(str_detect(pos, "GK"))
outfielders <- soccer_data %>% filter(!str_detect(pos, "GK"))
outfielders <- outfielders %>% filter(`Total Mins` >= 450)
defenders <- outfielders %>%
  filter(str_detect(pos, "DF")) %>%
  rename(
    `Touches in Defensive Penalty Area` = touches_def_pen,
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Interceptions per 90` = Interceptions / `Total Mins` * 90,
    `Progressive Pass Distance per 90` = `Progressive Pass Distance` / `Total Mins` * 90,
    `Passes Blocked per 90` =
      `Passes Blocked` / `Total Mins` * 90,
    `Key Passes per 90` = `Key Passes` / `Total Mins` * 90
  ) %>%
  select(
    -`Crosses Stopped`,
    -`Non-Penalty xG`,
    -carries_prgc,
    -`Goals Against`,
    -`Goals against p 90`,
    -`Saves`,
    -`Saves %`,
    -`Clean Sheets`,
    -`% Clean sheets`,
    -`% Penalty saves`
  )
```


```{r}
length(unique(defenders$player))
```

```{r}
defenders %>%
 group_by(comp) %>%
 summarise(
   mean_int = mean(`Interceptions per 90`),
   mean_tackle = mean(`Dribble Tackle Success %`),
   mean_aerial = mean(`Aerial Duel Win %`),
   mean_key = mean(`Key Passes per 90`),
   mean_prog = mean(`Progressive Pass Distance per 90`)
 )
```

```{r}
newdat_key <- expand.grid(
  age = mean(defenders$age),
  `Pass Completion %` = mean(defenders$`Pass Completion %`),
  `Progressive Pass Distance per 90` =
    mean(defenders$`Progressive Pass Distance per 90`),
  comp = unique(defenders$comp)
)

newdat_key$pred <- predict(m_key, newdata = newdat_key, re.form = NA)
print(newdat_key)

deltas_key <- expand_grid(
  from_league = newdat_key$comp,
  to_league = newdat_key$comp
) %>%
  left_join(
    newdat_key %>% select(comp,pred),
    by = c("from_league"="comp")
  ) %>%
  rename(pred_from = pred) %>%
  left_join(
    newdat_key %>% select(comp,pred),
    by = c("to_league"="comp")
  ) %>%
  rename(pred_to = pred) %>%
  mutate(delta = pred_to - pred_from)

ggplot(
  deltas_key,
  aes(from_league,to_league,fill=delta)
) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(delta,2)),
    color = "black",
    size = 5
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "steelblue4",
    mid = "white",
    high = "firebrick3",
    midpoint = 0
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted Change in Key Passes per 90 After League Switch",
    x = "Origin League",
    y = "Destination League"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

VarCorr(m_key)
```

```{r}
newdat_aerial <- expand.grid(
  age = mean(defenders$age),
  `Interceptions per 90` = mean(defenders$`Interceptions per 90`),
  `Passes Blocked per 90` = mean(defenders$`Passes Blocked per 90`),
  comp = unique(defenders$comp)
)

newdat_aerial$pred <- predict(m_aerial, newdata = newdat_aerial, re.form = NA)
print(newdat_aerial)

deltas_aerial <- expand_grid(
  from_league = newdat_aerial$comp,
  to_league = newdat_aerial$comp
) %>%
  left_join(
    newdat_aerial %>% select(comp,pred),
    by = c("from_league"="comp")
  ) %>%
  rename(pred_from = pred) %>%
  left_join(
    newdat_aerial %>% select(comp,pred),
    by = c("to_league"="comp")
  ) %>%
  rename(pred_to = pred) %>%
  mutate(delta = pred_to - pred_from)

ggplot(
  deltas_aerial,
  aes(from_league,to_league,fill=delta)
) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(delta,2)),
    color = "black",
    size = 5
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "steelblue4",
    mid = "white",
    high = "firebrick3",
    midpoint = 0
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted Change in Aerial Duel Win % After League Switch",
    x = "Origin League",
    y = "Destination League"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

VarCorr(m_aerial)
```

```{r}
m_null <- update(
  m_int,
  . ~ . - comp
)

anova(
  m_null,
  m_int
)

m_age_linear <- lmer(
 `Interceptions per 90` ~
   age +
   `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
   `Aerial Duel Win %` +
   `Passes Blocked per 90` +
   comp +
   (1|player) +
   (1|squad),
 data=defenders
)

m_age_quad <- lmer(
 `Interceptions per 90` ~
   age + I(age^2) +
   `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
   `Aerial Duel Win %` +
   `Passes Blocked per 90` +
   comp +
   (1|player) +
   (1|squad),
 data=defenders
)

anova(m_age_linear, m_age_quad)

m0 <- lmer(
 `Interceptions per 90` ~
   age +
   comp +
   (1|player) +
   (1|squad),
 data=defenders
)

m1 <- lmer(
 `Interceptions per 90` ~
   age +
   `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
   comp +
   (1|player) +
   (1|squad),
 data=defenders
)

m2 <- lmer(
 `Interceptions per 90` ~
   age +
   `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
   `Aerial Duel Win %` +
   comp +
   (1|player) +
   (1|squad),
 data=defenders
)

m3 <- lmer(
 `Interceptions per 90` ~
   age +
   `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
   `Aerial Duel Win %` +
   `Passes Blocked per 90` +
   comp +
   (1|player) +
   (1|squad),
 data=defenders
)

m4 <- lmer(
 `Interceptions per 90` ~
   age +
   `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
   `Aerial Duel Win %` +
   `Passes Blocked per 90` +
   `Expected Goals (xG)` +
   comp +
   (1|player) +
   (1|squad),
 data=defenders
)

AIC(m0,m1,m2,m3,m4)
anova(m0,m1,m2,m3,m4)

m_fixed_only <- lm(`Interceptions per 90` ~ age + comp, data = defenders)

m_player_re <- lmer(`Interceptions per 90` ~ age + comp + (1|player),
  data = defenders, REML = FALSE)

m_squad_re <- lmer(`Interceptions per 90` ~ age + comp + (1|squad),
  data = defenders, REML = FALSE)

m_player_squad_re <- lmer(`Interceptions per 90` ~ age + comp + (1|player) + (1|squad),
  data = defenders, REML = FALSE)

AIC(m_fixed_only, m_player_re, m_squad_re, m_player_squad_re)
anova(m_player_re, m_player_squad_re)
anova(m_squad_re, m_player_squad_re)
```

```{r}
m_int <- lmer(
  `Interceptions per 90` ~
    age +
    comp * `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
    comp * `Aerial Duel Win %` +
    `Key Passes per 90` +
    `Progressive Pass Distance per 90` +
    (1|player) + (1|squad),
  data = defenders
)

m_key <- lmer(
  `Key Passes per 90` ~
    age +
    `Interceptions per 90` +
    `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
    `Aerial Duel Win %` +
    comp * `Pass Completion %` +
    comp * `Progressive Pass Distance per 90` +
    (1|player) + (1|squad),
  data = defenders
)

m_aerial <- lmer(
  `Aerial Duel Win %` ~
    age +
    comp * `Interceptions per 90` +
    comp * `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
    `Key Passes per 90` +
    `Progressive Pass Distance per 90` +
    (1|player) + (1|squad),
  data = defenders
)

m_prog <- lmer(
  `Progressive Pass Distance per 90` ~
    age +
    `Interceptions per 90` +
    `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
    `Aerial Duel Win %` +
    comp * `Pass Completion %` +
    comp * `Key Passes per 90` +
    (1|player) + (1|squad),
  data = defenders
)


ball_winning <- expand.grid(
  age = mean(defenders$age),
  `Interceptions per 90` = quantile(defenders$`Interceptions per 90`,.75),
  `Dribble Tackle Success %` = quantile(defenders$`Dribble Tackle Success %`,.75),
  `Aerial Duel Win %` = quantile(defenders$`Aerial Duel Win %`,.75),
  `Pass Completion %` = quantile(defenders$`Pass Completion %`,.25),
  `Key Passes per 90` = quantile(defenders$`Key Passes per 90`,.25),
  `Progressive Pass Distance per 90` = quantile(defenders$`Progressive Pass Distance per 90`,.25),
  comp=unique(defenders$comp)
)

ball_playing <- expand.grid(
  age = mean(defenders$age),
  `Interceptions per 90` = quantile(defenders$`Interceptions per 90`,.25),
  `Dribble Tackle Success %` = quantile(defenders$`Dribble Tackle Success %`,.25),
  `Aerial Duel Win %` = quantile(defenders$`Aerial Duel Win %`,.25),
  `Pass Completion %` = quantile(defenders$`Pass Completion %`,.75),
  `Key Passes per 90`= quantile(defenders$`Key Passes per 90`,.75),
  `Progressive Pass Distance per 90` = quantile(defenders$`Progressive Pass Distance per 90`,.75),
  comp=unique(defenders$comp)
)

predict_archetype <- function(df,label) {
 df %>%
   mutate(
     int_pred = predict(m_int,newdata=.,re.form=NA),
     key_pred = predict(m_key,newdata=.,re.form=NA),
     aerial_pred = predict(m_aerial,newdata=.,re.form=NA),
     prog_pred = predict(m_prog,newdata=.,re.form=NA),
     archetype = label
   ) %>%
   select(
     archetype,
     comp,
     int_pred,
     key_pred,
     aerial_pred,
     prog_pred
   ) %>%
   pivot_longer(
     cols=-c(archetype,comp),
     names_to="metric",
     values_to="prediction"
   )
}

preds <- bind_rows(
 predict_archetype(
   ball_winning,
   "Ball-Winning"
 ),
 predict_archetype(
   ball_playing,
   "Ball-Playing"
 )
)

preds <- preds %>%
  group_by(metric) %>%
  mutate(z = as.numeric(scale(prediction))) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(preds, aes(metric,comp,fill=z)) +
  geom_tile(color="white")+
  geom_text(aes(label=round(z,2)), color="black") +
  facet_wrap(~archetype) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low="firebrick3", mid="white", high="goldenrod2", midpoint=0) +
  labs(
    title = "Mixed-Model Predicted League Suitability by Defender Archetype",
    x = "Performance Dimension",
    y = "League"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
player_re <- ranef(m_int)$player %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rename(effect = `(Intercept)`)

squad_re <- ranef(m_int)$squad %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rename(effect = `(Intercept)`)

p_player <- ggplot(player_re, aes(x = effect)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, color = "white") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = function(x) seq(0, ceiling(max(x)), by = 20)) +
  labs(
    title = "Player Random Effects",
    x = "Random Intercept",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

p_squad <- ggplot(squad_re, aes(x = effect)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 15, color = "white") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = function(x) seq(0, ceiling(max(x)), by = 2)) +
  labs(
    title = "Squad Random Effects",
    x = "Random Intercept",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

p_player + p_squad +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Distribution of Random Effects from Interceptions Model"
  )
```

```{r}
newdata_all <- bind_rows(
  ball_winning %>% mutate(archetype = "Ball-Winning"),
  ball_playing %>% mutate(archetype = "Ball-Playing")
)

make_boot_table <- function(model, newdata, metric_name, nsim = 500) {
  pred_fun <- function(fit) {
    predict(fit, newdata = newdata, re.form = NA)
  }
  boot_out <- bootMer(
    model,
    FUN = pred_fun,
    nsim = nsim,
    type = "parametric",
    use.u = FALSE
  )
  boot_df <- as.data.frame(boot_out$t)
  
  colnames(boot_df) <- paste(newdata$archetype, newdata$comp, sep = "___")
  
  boot_df %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = everything(),
      names_to = "cell",
      values_to = "prediction"
    ) %>%
    separate(
      cell,
      into = c("archetype", "comp"),
      sep = "___"
    ) %>%
    group_by(archetype, comp) %>%
    summarise(
      estimate = mean(prediction),
      lower_95 = quantile(prediction, 0.025),
      upper_95 = quantile(prediction, 0.975),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(metric = metric_name) %>%
    select(archetype, comp, metric, estimate, lower_95, upper_95)
}

set.seed(460)

ci_int <- make_boot_table(
  m_int,
  newdata_all,
  "Interceptions per 90",
  nsim = 500
)

ci_key <- make_boot_table(
  m_key,
  newdata_all,
  "Key Passes per 90",
  nsim = 500
)

ci_aerial <- make_boot_table(
  m_aerial,
  newdata_all,
  "Aerial Duel Win %",
  nsim = 500
)

ci_prog <- make_boot_table(
  m_prog,
  newdata_all,
  "Progressive Pass Distance per 90",
  nsim = 500
)

uncertainty_table <- bind_rows(ci_int, ci_key, ci_aerial, ci_prog) %>%
  arrange(archetype, metric, comp) %>%
  mutate(
    estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    lower_95 = round(lower_95, 3),
    upper_95 = round(upper_95, 3),
    ci = paste0(estimate, " (", lower_95, ", ", upper_95, ")")
  )
uncertainty_table %>%
  select(archetype, comp, metric, ci)
```
